message:
test(grapheme_pool): add 21 edge-case tests for GraphemePool intern/release/gc lifecycle (bd-1xhwe)

Cover pool Debug/Clone/Default traits, width=0/127 boundaries, empty/long
strings, clear-then-intern, with_capacity usage, freed-slot refcount/retain,
double release safety, multiple slot reuse cycles, free list LIFO ordering,
intern-after-release dedup, clone independence, double GC idempotency,
GC with pre-freed slots, 100-grapheme stress test, capacity growth,
len tracking across mixed operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
